name: person-lookup
description: Look up a person — work history, education, social profiles, and contact info — via Clado's natural-language people search, routed through the SELAT Router (MPP via Locus).

query.description: Search query combining person name with company, role, or geography for disambiguation, e.g. "Dario Amodei Anthropic CEO".

steps.label: person search — Clado (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
